name: QTP Supabase Health Monitor — 8:00 AM ET Weekdays

parameters.jsCode:
// QTP Supabase-only Health Monitor v4.2.1
// Read-only. No Alpaca calls. No trading logic changes.
return [{
  json: {
    monitor_version: 'QTP_SUPABASE_HEALTH_MONITOR_v4.2.1',
    checked_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    expected_counts: {"alert_route_verification_10fc": 193, "audit_trail": 195, "audit_trail_backup_20260430t0925z": 40, "candidate_path_trace_10fc": 3424, "daily_pnl": 1, "entry_pause_control": 1, "exec_flow_audit": 2722, "google_sheets_ai_feedback_raw": 49493, "infra_telemetry_15m": 1, "logging_dead_letter": 0, "new_indicator_candidates_raw": 55, "optimization_apply_log": 8, "optimization_cycle_ledger": 14, "optimization_recommendations": 202, "optimization_recommendations_backup_20260430t0920z": 6, "optimization_recommendations_dedupe_backup_20260430": 4, "optimization_recommendations_dedupe_stage_20260430t0920z": 4, "optimization_recommendations_pre_kept_apply_20260506t045645z": 4, "optimization_state_shadow": 4, "order_events": 2305, "performance_metrics": 4, "portfolio_snapshot": 33, "position_risk_state": 187, "public_signal_feed_raw": 0, "qtp_cost_guardrail_10o": 1, "quantum_strat_cache_raw": 543, "quantum_watchlist_raw": 554, "risk_events": 1, "risk_events_v2": 11047, "script_discovery_log_raw": 295, "selfopt_approval_queue_10o": 4, "selfopt_autofinalizer_runs": 351, "shadow_monitor_state": 18619, "strategy_signals": 16457, "system_health": 1, "telegram_grok_heartbeat": 1, "trade_log": 34, "vc_api_health_events_10o": 83, "vc_gate_forensics_shadow": 8348, "vc_shadow_score_observations": 0, "winrate_opportunity_shadow_10o": 9505, "wro_shadow_entry_quality_421": 2523, "xai_selfopt_brain_10o": 5},
    __supabase_health_sql: "SELECT 'alert_route_verification_10fc'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.alert_route_verification_10fc UNION ALL SELECT 'audit_trail'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.audit_trail UNION ALL SELECT 'audit_trail_backup_20260430t0925z'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.audit_trail_backup_20260430t0925z UNION ALL SELECT 'candidate_path_trace_10fc'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.candidate_path_trace_10fc quantum.risk_events_v2 UNION ALL SELECT 'script_discovery_log_raw'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.script_discovery_log_raw UNION ALL SELECT 'selfopt_approval_queue_10o'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.selfopt_approval_queue_10o UNION ALL SELECT 'selfopt_autofinalizer_runs'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.selfopt_autofinalizer_runs UNION ALL SELECT 'shadow_monitor_state'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.shadow_monitor_state UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_signals'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.strategy_signals UNION ALL SELECT 'system_health'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.system_health UNION ALL SELECT 'telegram_grok_heartbeat'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.telegram_grok_heartbeat UNION ALL SELECT 'trade_log'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.trade_log UNION ALL SELECT 'vc_api_health_events_10o'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.vc_api_health_events_10o UNION ALL SELECT 'vc_gate_forensics_shadow'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.vc_gate_forensics_shadow UNION ALL SELECT 'vc_shadow_score_observations'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.vc_shadow_score_observations UNION ALL SELECT 'winrate_opportunity_shadow_10o'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.winrate_opportunity_shadow_10o UNION ALL SELECT 'wro_shadow_entry_quality_421'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.wro_shadow_entry_quality_421 UNION ALL SELECT 'xai_selfopt_brain_10o'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value FROM quantum.xai_selfopt_brain_10o
 UNION ALL
SELECT '__dead_letters_24h'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value
FROM quantum.logging_dead_letter
WHERE failed_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
 UNION ALL
SELECT '__latest_open_positions'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value
FROM quantum.position_risk_state
WHERE observed_at = (SELECT MAX(observed_at) FROM quantum.position_risk_state)
 UNION ALL
SELECT '__latest_not_fully_protected'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value
FROM quantum.position_risk_state
WHERE observed_at = (SELECT MAX(observed_at) FROM quantum.position_risk_state)
  AND COALESCE(protection_status, '') <> 'FULLY_PROTECTED'
 UNION ALL
SELECT '__latest_new_entry_blockers'::text AS metric_name, COUNT(*)::bigint AS metric_value
FROM quantum.position_risk_state
WHERE observed_at = (SELECT MAX(observed_at) FROM quantum.position_risk_state)
  AND COALESCE(blocks_new_entries, false) = true
"
  }
}];
